name: Tentative Carryback Adjustment Application

eligibility.description: Available to taxpayers with a net operating loss carryback or unused excess profits credit carryback seeking accelerated refunds.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers can file for a tentative carryback adjustment of income taxes for a quick refund of taxes paid in prior years due to a net operating loss carryback.
